scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const src=path.join(__dirname,'.next','static','css');const dest=path.join(__dirname,'.next','standalone','.next','static','css');if(fs.existsSync(src)&&!fs.existsSync(dest)){fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.css')).forEach(f=>{fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dest,f));console.log('[postbuild] Copied CSS: '+f);});}if(fs.existsSync(src)){const dest2=path.join(__dirname,'.next','standalone','_next','static','css');if(!fs.existsSync(dest2)){fs.mkdirSync(dest2,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.css')).forEach(f=>{fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dest2,f));console.log('[postbuild] Copied CSS to _next: '+f);});}}"
